text_sections.section: How to Fill : UPSSSC UP Lekhpal Recruitment Online Form 2026
text_sections.content: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC Lekhpal Recruitment Advt No. 02-Exam/2025 Recruitment 2025. | First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category. | Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password. | After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | Take
